# attachments

**Instance Property**

Access sample attachments.

## Declaration

```swift
var attachments: [CMSampleBuffer.SampleAttachments]? { get set }
```

## Discussion

When setting attachments array, the number of entries must match [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMSampleBuffer/SamplePropertiesCollection/count].
title: attachments
